ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., BMJ) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_days" (
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading day */,
  "full_date" TEXT /* Full date of the trading day */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trading day */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the trading day */,
  "date" INTEGER /* Date of the trading day */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the trading day */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the year for the trading day */,
  "weekday_index" INTEGER /* Numeric index of the weekday (0=Monday, 6=Sunday) */,
  "weekday" TEXT /* Name of the weekday */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Unix timestamp of the trading day */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the day is a holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "day_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading day */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded during the day */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the stock (e.g., UPTREND, DOWNTREND, SIDEWAY) */,
  "adj_open" REAL /* Adjusted opening price */,
  "adj_high" REAL /* Adjusted high price */,
  "adj_low" REAL /* Adjusted low price */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_day_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_id") REFERENCES trading_days ("day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500, NASDAQ) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market index */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the market index (e.g., S&P, NASDAQ) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index component */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the index */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was added to the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_components_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_components_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_price_data" (
  "index_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index price data entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "day_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading day */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the index */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the index during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the index during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the index */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the index traded during the day */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the index (e.g., UPTREND, DOWNTREND, SIDEWAY) */,
  "adj_open" REAL /* Adjusted opening price */,
  "adj_high" REAL /* Adjusted high price */,
  "adj_low" REAL /* Adjusted low price */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_price_data_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_price_data_day_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_id") REFERENCES trading_days ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "day_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of the stock traded during the day */,
  "buy_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock bought during the day */,
  "sell_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock sold during the day */,
  "volume_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of buy volume to sell volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_day_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_id") REFERENCES trading_days ("day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "start_day_id" INTEGER /* ID of the start trading day of the trend */,
  "end_day_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end trading day of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of the trend (e.g., UPTREND, DOWNTREND, SIDEWAY) */,
  "trend_strength" REAL /* Strength of the trend (e.g., 0.8 for a strong trend) */,
  "trend_linearity" REAL /* Linearity of the trend (e.g., 0.9 for a highly linear trend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_end_day_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_day_id") REFERENCES trading_days ("day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_start_day_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_day_id") REFERENCES trading_days ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "day_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading day */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the technical indicator (e.g., SMA, EMA, RSI) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "indicator_signal" TEXT /* Signal generated by the technical indicator (e.g., BUY, SELL, NEUTRAL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_day_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_id") REFERENCES trading_days ("day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock (if applicable) */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index (if applicable) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., stock price, volume, trend) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock (if applicable) */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_screener" (
  "screener_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock screener entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the stock screener */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the stock screener (e.g., industry, market cap, price range) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the stock screener (e.g., list of stocks matching the criteria) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screener_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_screener_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
